prompt: Create a cinematic close-up photograph of an ornate vintage lampshade in a dim, luxurious interior. The composition is left-weighted: the lampshade fills the upper-left half of the frame and is cropped off at the top and left edges, while the right two-thirds fade into a warm golden bokeh background. The lampshade is deep crimson red velvet with intricate embroidered blue and gold peacock feather patterns, metallic gold thread, tiny bead chains, and exactly 12 visible dangling ornaments along the lower rim: 7 long gold tassels, 3 blue or green glass-bead drops, and 2 mixed bead-and-tassel strands. Include the brass lamp stem and a small glowing bulb partially visible at the far left. In the background, show a softly blurred wall of amber rectangular light panels and a dark indistinct human silhouette on the right, with no readable text. Use shallow depth of field, macro lens feel, warm tungsten lighting, rich contrast, glossy beads, detailed embroidery, cinematic color grading, 16:9 horizontal frame, elegant atmospheric mood.
